scripts.postinstall: cd Version1 && npm install && cd ../Version2 && npm install && cd ../Version3 && npm install
scripts.build: cd Version2 && npm run build && cd ../Version1 && npm run build && mkdir -p ../Version2/dist/v1 && cp -r dist/* ../Version2/dist/v1/ && cd ../Version3 && npm run build && mkdir -p ../Version2/dist/v3 && cp -r dist/* ../Version2/dist/v3/
